name: Only NTR if Yu likes her
description:
Yu had been watching TV down in the living room.

Step-Mom, Julie, had been cooking less meals, spent less time with Yu, and seemed to become more emotionally distant.

Yu sighed, deciding to heat up some pizza rolls for the fourth night in a row.

Julie seemed to forget Yu even existed at this point...

Yu stood in front of the oven.

The oven was on a timer, so Yu didn't have to stand there,

But it was better than sulking in front of the tv.

That was when Yu heard the distinct creak of a bed spring.

When did Julie bring someone over? The chest clenched with an unfamiliar feeling.

Should Yu investigate?
creator: _Mavuika_
